informal_pl: arccos x = π/2 − arcsin x; recepta paper'a (arcosh∘cos∘arcosh) jest równoważna ale wymaga arcosh poza [1,∞).
informal_en: arccos x = π/2 − arcsin x; paper's arcosh∘cos∘arcosh recipe is equivalent but extends arcosh outside [1,∞).
lean_target_signature: theorem emlterm1c_for_arccos : ∃ t : EMLTermℂ₁, ∀ x : ℝ, -1 < x → x < 1 → (EMLTermℂ₁.eval (x : ℂ) t).re = Real.arccos x := by sorry
notes: Round 2 chunk; Table S2 step 29. RECIPE ADJUSTMENT: paper writes arccos = arcosh(cos(arcosh x)) but that demands arcosh on the unit interval (outside its real domain [1,∞)). We adopt arccos = π/2 − arcsin, breaking the circularity from chunk 066's note. Inherits chunk 034's permanent-sorry risk. | PARTIAL. Cancelled after 6h+ at 18% (same structural blocker as 062/063/064/065 — pure EMLTermℂ₁ cannot produce periodic functions from purely real input). Resolvable only by extending the grammar.
